name: feedback
title: Feedback
description: A realtime feedback board on the CE mesh: post feedback, reply in threads, and upvote, with one board per target project. Durable in the app KV store, live over a /rt room, with a shadow-DOM embed.js drop-in widget and soft community moderation.

durable.note: invTs = (9999999999999 - ms).padStart(13) so newest posts sort first lexically; <target> is the per-project board id (?target=...).

realtime.note: each board is its own room so projects do not cross-talk; the server echoes frames to peers (self filtered by id).

moderation.rule: a post is collapsed once (flags - upvotes) >= 4, or when its author soft-deletes (dl: record); nothing is erased from the store and viewers can reveal.
moderation.rateLimit: 8s per identity per board (client); pairs with the hub per-namespace IP limiter (CE_HUB_RATELIMIT_NS=feedback).

embed.shared: the widget uses the same /db/feedback + /rt/feedback/t:<target> as the full board, so embedded and standalone posts share one thread per target.

deploy.note: Static deploy of index.html + embed.js. App id pinned via .ce/app-id; project name via ce-app.json.

owners.this: web/projects/feedback/ (the feedback ce-app: index.html, embed.js, config)
